---
title: "tune_weights.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/tune_weights.py"
loc: 119
complexity: 26
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 5.43
overall_score: 2.91
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating MetaLearner, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import MetaLearner and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 19 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [collections](file://collections)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `MetaLearner`
- `__init__`
- `analyze_failure`
- `report`
- `apply_updates`
- `WeightTuner`
- `execute`
- `_res`
